title: Ubiquiti UniFi AP U7-Pro-Outdoor
description: The Ubiquiti U7 Pro Outdoor is a new outdoor dual-band unit supporting Wi-Fi 7 and rated as IP67 . It operates in the 2.4 GHz band at speeds of up to 688 Mbps and the 5 GHz band at up to 8.6 Gbps. The unit features a built-in antenna with a gain of 8-11 dBi and a 90° beamwidth. Additionally, the package includes two external omnidirectional antennas that can be connected via RP-SMA connectors located at the top. For network connectivity, it provides a LAN port supporting speeds of up to 2.5… The access point offers versatile mounting options for walls, ceilings, or poles, and includes mounting accessories in the package, along with a weatherproof cable gland for outdoor use The device requires downloading the official UniFi Controller software from the official website, which enables centralized network management. A significant advantage of the UniFi Controller is that it is completely free without any limitations ! This central management system allows you to upload maps, configure basic parameters such as SSID, guest accounts, splash pages, traffic statistics, and view a list and status of connected clients quickly and easily Zero Handoff Roaming - seamless transition between access points Wireless uplink (ideal for locations where a data cable cannot be run) Up to 8 SSIDs Detailed traffic statistics Guest network Voucher system Load balancing - maintaining balanced client distribution Bandwidth limiting for each SSID Device Wall, ceiling, and pole mounts Weatherproof cable gland Drilling template Cable tie Mounting kit
